programmes.statusNote: The official curriculum publishes optional Natural Language Processing and Visual Computing Streams plus Dissertation, Project and taught-subject completion paths. The Visual Computing Stream requires one of COMP5422 or COMP5425. Up to 6 credits of approved non-COMP electives may be used without a fixed code list. These mutually exclusive and approval-dependent paths require manual audit review, and no unlisted course is invented.

courseGroups.name: Programme Core Subjects
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete all three Programme Core Subjects.

courseGroups.name: Stream Core / Shared Elective Subjects
courseGroups.ruleText: Natural Language Processing requires COMP5511, COMP5152, COMP5423 and COMP5517. Visual Computing requires COMP5511, COMP5523, COMP5541 and one of COMP5422 or COMP5425. Without a Stream, these subjects remain part of the published elective pool.

courseGroups.name: Elective Subjects
courseGroups.ruleText: Without a Stream, complete four electives with Dissertation, five with Project, or seven on the taught-subject path. With a Stream, complete no additional elective with Dissertation, one with Project, or three on the taught-subject path. Up to 6 credits of approved non-COMP electives may replace listed electives and require manual review.

courses.name: Distributed Ledger Technology, Cryptocurrency and E-Payment
Theory and Practice of Video Game Design
Advanced Techniques for High-Dimensional Data Management and Analytics
IT Startup: From Idea to Business Plan

courseGroups.name: Project Option
courseGroups.ruleText: COMP5933 Project is a 6-credit alternative to the Dissertation and taught-subject-only paths.

courseGroups.name: Dissertation Option
courseGroups.ruleText: COMP5940 Dissertation is a 9-credit alternative to the Project and taught-subject-only paths.

courseGroups.name: Academic Integrity and Ethics
courseGroups.ruleText: For the 2026/27 intake onwards, complete DSAI5T09.

courses.name: Academic Integrity and Ethics in Computer and Mathematical Sciences

courseGroups.name: Core Subjects
courseGroups.ruleText: Choose any six of the eight Core Subjects.
